title: NPR's Steve Inskeep speaks with tech journalist Joanna Stern about the release of new augmented reality glasses from …
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep speaks with tech journalist Joanna Stern about the release of new augmented reality glasses from Snap and the future of wearable technology.
author: npr.org

title: Burrows spent his career behind the camera specializing in situation comedies. Few viewers recognized him or knew his…
description: Burrows spent his career behind the camera specializing in situation comedies. Few viewers recognized him or knew his name, other than to see it flash quickly on the screen in the opening credits. But they knew his work. n.pr/3SR5mla

title: Update: As Christian Pulisic sat with a hurt calf, the U.S. dominated the first half to remain undefeated in group pl…
description: Update: As Christian Pulisic sat with a hurt calf, the U.S. dominated the first half to remain undefeated in group play. If Turkey draws or loses tonight, the Americans will be guaranteed to win their group.
author: npr.org
